name: Azithromycin Compounded Capsule for Dogs & Cats
description: Azithromycin is a macrolide antibiotic that may be prescribed for infections. Azithromycin Compounded capsule is a blue and white elongated capsule made specifically for your pet. **Please note your capsules may be either blue and opaque-white or blue and clear. There has been no change to the medication's formulation, this only impacts the capsule's appearance.**
